item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: We are back on 27 July.

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Herb-roasted turkey with fried potatoes, topped with crisp frisée salad tossed in mustard vinaigrette. (11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Fried mushroom patty with plenty of herbs and fried potatoes, topped with crisp frisée salad tossed in mustard vinaigrette. (11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: We look forward to welcoming you back on 27 July. Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Pork Creole: slow-cooked, New Orleans-spiced pork stew full of depth and flavour, served with wild rice and topped with parsley and spring onions. Served with smoked chilli sauce and vegetarian maque choux. (10+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Mushroom Creole: New Orleans-spiced mushroom stew full of depth and flavour, served with wild rice and topped with parsley and spring onions. Served with smoked chilli sauce and vegetarian maque choux. (10+15)
